convoyeur.rgb: Converts red, green, blue channels into a RGB color
convoyeur.rgb|param|blue: value of the blue channel between 0 and 255. eg: 255
convoyeur.rgb|param|green: value of the green channel between 0 and 255. eg: 255
convoyeur.rgb|param|red: value of the red channel between 0 and 255. eg: 255
